justification: All pass criteria met: boundaries correct (10 is heavy, 50 is freight), all 5 ACs covered with explicit AC-to-test mapping in acceptance_criteria_coverage, no external dependencies, no features beyond spec, confidence.level 99 >= 85. Additional boundary tests (9.99, 49.99, 1000, -1) demonstrate thoroughness without adding unrequested features.

observations.text: Boundary logic correct: strict < comparisons ensure 10 → heavy and 50 → freight
All 5 ACs explicitly mapped to named test cases with pass/fail status
Extra boundary tests (9.99, 49.99, 1000, -1) strengthen coverage without gold-plating
No external dependencies — pure TypeScript as specified
Assumptions about upper bound and float inputs are reasonable and documented
